2603.25562.title: Revisiting On-Policy Distillation: Empirical Failure Modes and Simple Fixes
2603.25562.paper_summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) is appealing for large language model (LLM) post-training because it evaluates teacher feedback on student-generated rollouts rather than fixed teacher traces. In long-horizon settings, however, the common sampled-token variant is fragile: it reduces distribution matching to a one-token signal and becomes increasingly unreliable as rollouts drift away from prefixes the teacher commonly visits. We revisit OPD from the estimator and implementation sides. Theoretically, token-level OPD is biased relative to sequence-level reverse-KL, but it has a much tighter worst-case variance bound; our toy study shows the same tradeoff empirically, with stronger future-reward coupling producing higher gradient variance and less stable learning. Empirically, we identify three failure modes of sampled-token OPD: an imbalanced one-token signal, unreliable teacher guidance on student-generated prefixes, and distortions caused by tokenizer or special-token mismatch. We address these issues with teacher top-K local support matching, implemented as truncated reverse-KL with top-p rollout sampling and special-token masking. Across single-task math reasoning and multi-task agentic-plus-math training, this objective yields more stable optimization and better downstream performance than sampled-token OPD.
2603.25562.paper_summary_zh: 在政策蒸餾（OPD）對於大型語言模型（LLM）後訓練來說是有吸引力的，因為它評估教師對學生生成的回合的反饋，而不是固定的教師痕跡。<lb/>然而，在長期設定中，常見的取樣標記變體是脆弱的：它將分佈匹配簡化為單一標記信號，並且隨著回合偏離教師常見訪問的前綴而變得越來越不可靠。<lb/>我們從估計器和實施的角度重新審視OPD。<lb/>理論上，標記級的OPD相對於序列級的反向KL是有偏的，但它有著更緊湊的最壞情況方差界限；我們的玩具研究在經驗上顯示了相同的權衡，強的未來獎勵耦合產生了更高的梯度方差和不太穩定的學習。<lb/>在經驗上，我們確定了取樣標記OPD的三種失敗模式：不平衡的單一標記信號、對學生生成的前綴的不可靠教師指導，以及由於分詞器或特殊標記不匹配而造成的扭曲。<lb/>我們通過教師的 top-K 本地支持匹配來解決這些問題，實施為帶有 top-p 回合取樣和特殊標記掩碼的截斷反向KL。<lb/>在單任務數學推理和多任務代理加數學訓練中，這一目標比取樣標記OPD產生了更穩定的優化和更好的下游性能。
2603.25562.author: Yuqian Fu et.al.
2603.25562.authors: Yuqian Fu, Haohuan Huang, Kaiwen Jiang, Yuanheng Zhu, Dongbin Zhao
